title: teucrium orientale var. orientale
intro: Teucrium orientale var. orientale, commonly known as the oriental germander, is a plant species within the Teucrium genus, belonging to the family Lamiaceae. The medicinal properties of this plant are attributed to its essential oil, which has been used to treat various health conditions, including digestive issues and anxiety. The health benefits of oriental germander include its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which may help to protect against cell damage and promote overall well-being. Oriental germander can be prepared as a tea, capsule, or tincture, and is often used in traditional herbal medicine to support digestive health and reduce stress.
